assertions.text: Inspects git state (git status, git diff, git log --oneline -10) before committing.
Produces a Conventional Commits message in type(scope): subject form with an optional why-focused body.
Stages specific files by name rather than git add -A, and never commits .env or credentials.

cases.prompt: Stage and commit this change with a good message.

assertions.text: Classifies the change into a commit type (feat/fix/docs/refactor/test/chore/perf/style).
Runs git status after committing to confirm success and does not push unless asked.
